title: Memory concern
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers
source.population: Adults with suspected or diagnosed dementia and their carers.
source.setting: Initial assessment, specialist assessment, ongoing care coordination, and support.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult memory and cognitive concern assessment and support; partial for undifferentiated memory symptoms and not directly validated for UAE referral, driving, or social-care pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented driving information and review of carer information, assessment, education, and support needs.
